name: one-on-ones
description: Run 1-1s that surface real signal: prep agendas, capture follow-ups, diagnose when 1-1s feel off, and onboard new reporting relationships.

name: feedback-and-reviews
description: Give feedback in the moment and write performance reviews with no surprises, including 360s, self-reviews, and calibration.

name: project-breakdown
description: Plan multi-week engineering projects: break down deliverables, estimate timelines, run premortems, and decide what to cut as deadlines approach.

name: team-health-debugger
description: Diagnose a team that feels off: shipping problems, low energy, drama, conflict, attrition, or inherited teams you do not yet understand.

name: hard-conversations
description: Prepare for and deliver difficult conversations: PIPs, coaching out, declining leadership asks, addressing toxic behavior, bad news at scale.

name: hiring-and-interviewing
description: Hire engineers and managers: write JDs, design and calibrate loops, debrief, check references, and evaluate culture fit.

name: career-growth
description: Career development for self and reports: promotions, growth plans, ladder design, stretch projects, IC vs management decisions.

name: first-week-snapshot
description: Structure the first weeks as a new manager: triangulate your view, your manager's view, and the team's view; build the action list.

name: manager-toolkit
description: Self-organization for managers: calendar, to-do list, email, capture; Grove's four activity categories and the output equation.

name: one-to-ones-stanier
description: Stanier-style 1-1s: contracting with new reports, rolling agendas, the 70% rule, silence, Andon Cord, and you are not a therapist.

name: motivation-and-fit
description: Match work to person: Maslow at work, zone of proximal development, skill trees, cathedral-vs-bazaar motivation profiles.

name: performance-reviews-stanier
description: Run performance reviews on a 6-month cadence: tracker spreadsheet, peer feedback email, written-first form, decoupling pay from review.

name: hiring-stanier
description: Hire well: who-to-hire mindset, JD template, gender-neutral writing, 6-stage funnel, interview do's/don'ts, take-home rules.

name: stress-and-pressure
description: Handle pressure: Eye of Sauron, MoSCoW prioritization, scope/resources/time levers, Brooks's Law, Mount Stupid, imposter syndrome.

name: information-and-politics
description: Navigate sensitive information and politics: spies vs. gatekeepers, three categories of information, leave-nobody-behind, disagree and commit.

name: letting-go-and-self-care
description: Sustain the role: Stoic trichotomy of control, internal vs external goals, L-mode/R-mode, 85% capacity rule, sleep, movement, mindful breathing.

name: team-housekeeping
description: Run the team's operating practices: Conway's Law, guilds, lightning talks, five whys, management bugs, ADRs, team health checks, DRIs.

name: career-vision-exercise
description: Deliver the 10-year career exercise: past/future timeline, vision statement, plan statement, skills backlog — as a sequence of coaching sessions.
